interfaces.name: Point2D
interfaces.signature: struct Point2D: Codable, Equatable, Hashable { var x: Double; var y: Double }
interfaces.notes: Foundation-only, UmbraCore package

interfaces.name: Size2D
interfaces.signature: struct Size2D: Codable, Equatable, Hashable { var width: Double; var height: Double }
interfaces.notes: UmbraCore

interfaces.name: Polygon
interfaces.signature: struct Polygon: Codable, Equatable { var points: [Point2D] }
interfaces.notes: Ordered ring; used for target silhouette and derived shadow shapes. LOCKED: vector only, never a raster/UIImage — required for exact/epsilon geometry comparisons and VoiceOver position/rotation descriptions

interfaces.name: OccluderShape
interfaces.signature: enum OccluderShape: Codable, Equatable { case rectangle }
interfaces.notes: v1 has one case; future primitives add cases, never a schema rewrite

interfaces.name: Occluder
interfaces.signature: struct Occluder: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; var shape: OccluderShape; var center: Point2D; var size: Size2D; var rotationDegrees: Double }
interfaces.notes: UmbraCore

interfaces.name: LightSource
interfaces.signature: struct LightSource: Codable, Equatable { var position: Point2D }
interfaces.notes: Single point light per locked determinism decision

interfaces.name: TargetSilhouette
interfaces.signature: struct TargetSilhouette: Codable, Equatable { var outline: Polygon }
interfaces.notes: UmbraCore

interfaces.name: Level
interfaces.signature: struct Level: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; var schemaVersion: Int; var title: String; var lightSource: LightSource; var occluders: [Occluder]; var target: TargetSilhouette; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: The single canonical schema shared by Play, Edit, export, import, and the solve-checker. Value type — mutation always produces a new Level value, never in-place array mutation

interfaces.name: LevelMutation
interfaces.signature: enum LevelMutation: Codable, Equatable { case moveOccluder(id: UUID, to: Point2D); case rotateOccluder(id: UUID, degrees: Double); case moveLight(to: Point2D); case duplicateOccluder(id: UUID); case deleteOccluder(id: UUID); case reset }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED: the only input surface for level state changes; gestures, nudge-arrows, rotation-stepper, and replay/fuzz tests all construct these same cases

interfaces.name: MatchState
interfaces.signature: enum MatchState: Codable, Equatable { case none; case close; case solved; static func classify(overlapFraction: Double) -> MatchState }
interfaces.notes: Thresholds: close >= 0.970, solved >= 0.985, fixed deadband to avoid jitter flicker

interfaces.name: SolveResult
interfaces.signature: struct SolveResult: Codable, Equatable { var overlapFraction: Double; var state: MatchState }
interfaces.notes: Output of SolveEngine.solve(_:), never independently stored/driftable

interfaces.name: SolveEngine
interfaces.signature: enum SolveEngine { static func castShadowPolygon(light: LightSource, occluder: Occluder) -> Polygon; static func unionShadow(_ polygons: [Polygon]) -> Polygon; static func overlapFraction(shadow: Polygon, target: Polygon) -> Double; static func solve(_ level: Level) -> SolveResult }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED: pure, synchronous, no async/Task. Overlap for a possibly-non-convex shadow union computed via fixed-resolution deterministic scanline quadrature (2048 horizontal strips, exact analytic per-strip trapezoid math over crossing edges) — not general polygon boolean ops, not sampling/Monte Carlo, not a third-party geometry library

interfaces.name: LevelValidator
interfaces.signature: enum LevelValidator { static func validate(_ level: Level) -> Result<Void, LevelValidationError> }
interfaces.notes: Save-time gate; reuses SolveEngine plus checks for zero-area shadow, light-inside-occluder, unreachable target. Same function used by editor save and importer geometrically-invalid check

interfaces.name: LevelValidationError
interfaces.signature: enum LevelValidationError: Error, Equatable { case unreachableTarget; case degenerateGeometry(reason: String); case lightInsideOccluder }
interfaces.notes: Drives the inline 'why save is disabled' Edit state

interfaces.name: LevelArtifactEnvelope
interfaces.signature: struct LevelArtifactEnvelope: Codable, Equatable { var schemaVersion: Int; var payload: Level }
interfaces.notes: Encoded to base64url JSON string for ShareLink/paste

interfaces.name: ImportFailure
interfaces.signature: enum ImportFailure: Error, Equatable { case truncatedOrMalformed; case unsupportedSchemaVersion(found: Int, supportedRange: ClosedRange<Int>); case geometricallyInvalid(reason: String) }
interfaces.notes: Maps 1:1 to the three locked, visually-distinct import error states

interfaces.name: ShareArtifactCoder
interfaces.signature: enum ShareArtifactCoder { static func encode(_ level: Level) -> String; static func decode(_ artifactString: String) -> Result<Level, ImportFailure> }
interfaces.notes: Single parser for Import screen and any future deep-link path. Decodes a locally-pasted/shared string only — no networking, no URLSession, no remote fetch anywhere in this app

interfaces.name: VaultEntry
interfaces.signature: struct VaultEntry: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; var title: String; var solved: Bool; var starred: Bool; var bestOverlap: Double?; var updatedAt: Date; var targetPreview: Polygon }
interfaces.notes: solved flag is recomputed/invalidated on load and on edit-geometry-change, never independently mutated. targetPreview is vector geometry, not a rendered image

interfaces.name: VaultManifest
interfaces.signature: struct VaultManifest: Codable, Equatable { var schemaVersion: Int; var entries: [VaultEntry] }
interfaces.notes: One manifest file; individual Level files loaded lazily on open

interfaces.name: LevelStore
interfaces.signature: protocol LevelStore { func loadManifest() throws -> VaultManifest; func loadLevel(id: UUID) throws -> Level; func saveLevel(_ level: Level) throws; func saveDraft(_ level: Level) throws; func loadDraft(for id: UUID) throws -> Level?; func clearDraft(for id: UUID) throws; func deleteLevel(id: UUID) throws; func importAsNewEntry(_ level: Level) throws -> VaultEntry }
interfaces.notes: Cloud-ready seam; FileLevelStore is the only v1 conformance. importAsNewEntry always inserts, never overwrites on id collision. Synchronous, throwing — no async networking layer

interfaces.name: FileLevelStore
interfaces.signature: final class FileLevelStore: LevelStore { init(baseDirectory: URL) }
interfaces.notes: Atomic writes: temp file + FileManager.replaceItemAt(_:withItemAt:); Application Support directory. Purely local filesystem I/O

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementStore { var isProEditorUnlocked: Bool { get }; func refreshEntitlements() async }
interfaces.notes: Seam for future StoreKit 2 tiers only — the sole place async is expected in this app's data layer, since real StoreKit calls are genuinely async later

interfaces.name: LocalAlwaysUnlockedEntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: final class LocalAlwaysUnlockedEntitlementStore: EntitlementStore { var isProEditorUnlocked: Bool { true }; func refreshEntitlements() async {} }
interfaces.notes: Only conformance for this MVP slice; purchase flow deferred

interfaces.name: LoadState
interfaces.signature: enum LoadState<Value, Failure: Error> { case idle; case loading; case loaded(Value); case failed(Failure) }
interfaces.notes: Shared generic state machine reused by Vault, Import, and level-resume so empty/loading/success/error is structurally uniform

interfaces.name: AppRoute
interfaces.signature: enum AppRoute: Hashable { case level(id: UUID) }
interfaces.notes: NavigationStack path type; Vault is always implicit root

interfaces.name: AppModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class AppModel { var path: [AppRoute]; let vaultStore: VaultStore; let entitlementStore: EntitlementStore }
interfaces.notes: Single root observable owning navigation + top-level stores

interfaces.name: VaultStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class VaultStore { var loadState: LoadState<VaultManifest, VaultError>; init(store: LevelStore); func refresh(); func importArtifact(_ level: Level) throws -> VaultEntry }
interfaces.notes: Wraps LevelStore for the app layer

interfaces.name: VaultError
interfaces.signature: enum VaultError: Error, Equatable { case corruptManifest; case ioFailure(String) }
interfaces.notes: Drives Vault's corrupted-save error state

interfaces.name: CanvasMode
interfaces.signature: enum CanvasMode: Equatable { case play; case edit }
interfaces.notes: PuzzleCanvasView is mode-parameterized, never a separate screen for edit

interfaces.name: LevelSessionModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class LevelSessionModel { private(set) var level: Level; var mode: CanvasMode; var selection: UUID?; private(set) var liveSolveResult: SolveResult; init(level: Level, store: LevelStore); func apply(_ mutation: LevelMutation); func commitSave() throws }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED: apply(_:) is synchronous — computes a new Level value from the current one via pure functions, then assigns; never mutates array elements in place. Sole mutation entry point for gesture, discrete-control, and replay-test callers alike

interfaces.name: ImportScreenState
interfaces.signature: enum ImportScreenState: Equatable { case empty; case decoding; case preview(Level); case failure(ImportFailure) }
interfaces.notes: Drives ImportScreen's four states; preview requires explicit user confirm before importAsNewEntry

interfaces.name: SelectionControlClusterLayout
interfaces.signature: enum SelectionControlClusterLayout: Equatable { case floating(anchorEdge: Edge); case docked }
interfaces.notes: Floating anchor-flip at standard Dynamic Type / canvas size, docked at AX1+ or below the compact-canvas threshold

interfaces.name: CastShadowRenderer
interfaces.signature: enum CastShadowRenderer { static func path(for polygon: Polygon) -> Path }
interfaces.notes: Pure geometry-to-SwiftUI-Path bridge; no gesture or solve logic, keeps UmbraCore Foundation-only

interfaces.name: SolveConfirmationHapticTrigger
interfaces.signature: enum SolveConfirmationHaptics { static func fireSolved(); static func fireCloseMatchTick() }
interfaces.notes: Wraps UINotificationFeedbackGenerator/UIImpactFeedbackGenerator

interfaces.name: CorruptedSaveErrorPresentation
interfaces.signature: struct CorruptedSaveErrorPresentation: Equatable { var title: String; var message: String; var recoveryActionTitle: String }
interfaces.notes: Backing content for CorruptedSaveErrorView and the Level-resume-fails-validation fallback

interfaces.name: OnboardingCoachMarkStep
interfaces.signature: enum OnboardingCoachMarkStep: Int, CaseIterable { case moveOccluder; case rotateOccluder; case resetLevel }
interfaces.notes: Persisted 'seen' flag in UserDefaults; dismissed by performing the taught gesture, not a Next button

interfaces.name: ReduceMotionSolveTransition
interfaces.signature: enum SolveConfirmationTransition { static func animation(reduceMotionEnabled: Bool) -> Animation }
interfaces.notes: Highlight-sweep vs. cross-fade fallback; the cue itself is mandatory, only its motion style adapts

interfaces.name: SolveConfirmationHaptics
interfaces.signature: enum SolveConfirmationHaptics { static func fireSolved(); static func fireCloseMatchTick() }
interfaces.notes: Wraps UINotificationFeedbackGenerator/UIImpactFeedbackGenerator

interfaces.name: SolveConfirmationTransition
interfaces.signature: enum SolveConfirmationTransition { static func animation(reduceMotionEnabled: Bool) -> Animation }
interfaces.notes: Highlight-sweep vs. cross-fade fallback; the cue itself is mandatory, only its motion style adapts

interfaces.name: Item
interfaces.signature: struct Item { id: Int;  // Placeholder for data later;  }
interfaces.notes: Minimal struct to represent a puzzle element.  Schema versioning must be explicitly managed.

interfaces.name: API
interfaces.signature: protocol API { func fetch() async throws returns (Data) }
interfaces.notes: Abstracted network access. MUST be cancellable. Implementations will likely be created in the build process to inject dependencies for testability.

interfaces.name: URLSession.shared
interfaces.signature: var URLSession.shared: URLSession
interfaces.notes: A singleton instance of the URLSession. This is critical for consistent testing.

interfaces.name: Task.sleep
interfaces.signature: func Task.sleep(for duration: TimeInterval) -> Void
interfaces.notes: A safe function that yields execution to allow other tasks to execute.
